chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2767 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.20881/2021 2. For hearing of Misc. No.20882/2021 3. For hearing of Misc. No.2046/2021 4. For hearing of main case 03.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Wajid Wyne, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This petition is pending since 2015. Learned counsel remains unable to befall the petitioner within the definition of aggrieved persons within the meaning of Article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
